Question:
Sabra found a pantry in the bank. The label on the pantry says coat. Sabra couldnŌĆÖt see what was inside the pantry. Sabra opened the pantry and found a mitten. There is no coat in the pantry. Sabra closed the pantry and put it back. Meira entered the bank and saw the pantry. After Meira opened the pantry, what would Meira expect to find in the pantry?
A. mitten
B. coat

container. Person A opened the container and found item Y. Later, Person B entered the room and saw the container.

[Candidate Answers]
A. vest
